title: My Simple Claude Cowork System (for normal people)
summary: Claude Cowork is a workspace system that transforms Claude into an AI operating system through persistent memory, instruction files, and a three-level hierarchy of workstations and projects. The system uses Claude as an "AI Second Brain" for managing workflows including email, spending, and content generation.
